description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular main structure with a flat roof and a long, narrow horizontal element extending from both sides, possibly representing a driveway or architectural overhang. The main building is divided into two contrasting color blocks, with one side in dark gray or black and the other in white, suggesting a modern, minimalist design. The roof appears flat and unadorned, with a few small, square window openings visible on the upper portion of the facade. The windows are arranged in a simple, grid-like pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is subtle and integrated into the facade, lacking prominent steps, porches, or decorative columns. The overall form is geometric and streamlined, emphasizing clean lines and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, minimalist house with a flat roof, contrasting dark and light color blocks, and a long horizontal extension. Features simple grid windows and a subtle, integrated entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main rectangular structure with a flat roof, grid-like windows, and the long horizontal extension spanning both sides.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the house and the thinness of the horizontal extension, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the house, with the color block contrast and the extension visible, but fewer architectural details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the other end of the horizontal extension and the blocky, geometric form of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist flush entryway with no visible steps, porch, or decorative elements
